title: Package typecheck does not validate the build TypeScript project
reasoning: The package build script compiles with tsconfig.build.json, but the typecheck script runs tsc --noEmit against tsconfig.json. If those configs include different files or compiler options, the advertised package typecheck can pass while the actual release build still fails. That weakens this script as a release gate for @codenuke/stats.
recommendation: Align the typecheck script with the build project, or add an additional build-config typecheck such as tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.build.json if tsconfig.json is intentionally broader for development/tests.
whyTestsDoNotAlreadyCoverThis: No linked tests or packaging checks are included for this feature, and the package script itself is the only evidence shown.
suggestedRegressionTest: Add a package-level release smoke or workspace script test that runs the @codenuke/stats typecheck and build scripts and fails if either TypeScript project is invalid.
